title: Internet Problems
drDigitalIntro: No internet? Work through this: Is WiFi on? (check the menu bar). Can you reach your router's settings page (usually 192.168.1.1)? Try turning WiFi off and back on. Restart your router by unplugging it for 30 seconds. If other devices in your home also have no internet, the problem is with your internet provider — call them. If only your Mac is affected, it's a Mac or router issue.

playgroundTask.question: Your Mac has no internet. Your phone also has no WiFi. Your neighbor's internet is also out. Where is the problem?

options.text: Your Mac has a serious hardware defect
Your internet service provider (ISP) is having an outage
Your Mac needs a software update

drDigitalSuccess: If multiple devices and neighbors are all affected, the outage is with the internet provider — not something you can fix yourself.
drDigitalHint: If every device in the area is affected, where is the problem likely coming from?
